import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { LogOut, User, MapPin, Calendar, Star, TrendingUp, Mountain, Compass, Wallet, Bell, Settings, Search, Filter, Heart, Share2, MessageSquare, Users, Clock, CheckCircle, ChevronRight, BookOpen, Home, Navigation, LogIn, UserPlus, ArrowRight, Globe, Award, Shield, Coffee, Camera, Sunrise } from "lucide-react"; import { useNavigate, Link } from "react-router-dom"; import axios from "axios"; import { useLogoutHandler } from "../hooks/useLogoutHandler"; import LogoutModal from "../components/LogoutModal"; const Dashboard = () => { const [user, setUser] = useState(null); const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("discover"); const navigate = useNavigate(); const { handleLogout, showLogoutModal, setShowLogoutModal } = useLogoutHandler(); useEffect(() => { // Check if user is logged in const checkAuth = () => { const token = localStorage.getItem("token"); const userData = localStorage.getItem("user"); if (token && userData) { setUser(JSON.parse(userData)); } setIsLoading(false); }; checkAuth(); }, []); // handleLogout is now from the custom hook // Sample trail data for landing page const popularTrails = [ { id: 1, name: "Annapurna Base Camp Trek", location: "Pokhara, Nepal", difficulty: "Moderate", duration: "10-14 days", rating: 4.8, price: "$899", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551632811-561732d1e306?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", featured: true }, { id: 2, name: "Everest Base Camp", location: "Sagarmatha Zone", difficulty: "Challenging", duration: "12-16 days", rating: 4.9, price: "$1299", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513415564515-763d91423bdd?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80" }, { id: 3, name: "Langtang Valley", location: "Langtang Region", difficulty: "Easy-Moderate", duration: "7-10 days", rating: 4.6, price: "$699", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80" } ]; const features = [ { icon: , title: "Discover Hidden Trails", description: "Explore off-the-beaten-path destinations only locals know about" }, { icon: , title: "Local Guides & Hosts", description: "Connect with certified local guides and authentic homestays" }, { icon: , title: "Safe & Verified", description: "All guides and hosts are verified with proper credentials" }, { icon: , title: "Cultural Experiences", description: "Immerse in authentic Nepali culture and traditions" } ]; const stats = [ { value: "500+", label: "Hidden Trails" }, { value: "200+", label: "Local Guides" }, { value: "10K+", label: "Happy Travelers" }, { value: "50+", label: "Destinations" } ]; if (isLoading) { return (
); } // If user is NOT logged in, show landing page if (!user) { return (

How OffTrailNepal Works

Your journey to authentic Nepali adventures in three simple steps

1

Create Your Profile

2

Discover & Connect

3

Start Your Adventure

Book your experience and embark on an authentic Himalayan journey.
